summary: Re-chunk + re-embed Orphic Hymns after C1+C2 land — invoke chunk.py and embed_corpus.py --reindex
description:
After C1 (chunker fix) and C2 (Orphic normalizer + config) land, regenerate the corpus:

```bash
# 1. Re-chunk just this text — overwrites corpus/greek_mystery/orphic-hymns/chunks/
python scripts/chunk.py --tradition greek_mystery --text orphic-hymns

# 2. Re-embed only this text's chunks — replaces rows in chunk_embeddings
python scripts/embed_corpus.py --reindex --tradition greek_mystery --text orphic-hymns

# 3. Verify
python scripts/validate_index.py
```

**Don't:**
- hand-edit any file under `corpus/greek_mystery/orphic-hymns/chunks/`
- delete and re-fetch `raw/greek_mystery/orphic-hymns-*.txt` (the raw is fine — it's the chunker that misreads it)

**Risk:** the chunk count will change (one chunk per Roman-numeral hymn instead of one per page), so any downstream tables that key on `chunk_id` need attention. Check:
- `nodes` table (chunk node rows will be replaced if the script handles that)
- `edges` table (any EXPRESSES / PARALLELS / CONTRASTS rows on Orphic chunks will dangle if old chunk_ids vanish)
- `staged_tags` and `staged_edges` — same concern
- `chunk_embeddings` — `--reindex` should overwrite by chunk_id, but old chunk_ids that no longer exist will leak

Likely needs a small follow-up SQL pass to delete dangling rows on Orphic chunk_ids, OR run on a backed-up DB and verify before rolling forward.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Verified scripts/chunk.py supports --tradition <name> + --only <source_id> filters (chunk.py:270, 285-288), and scripts/embed_corpus.py supports --tradition + --text filters. Dry-run scoped to orphic-hymns only touches that text — confirmed via 'python scripts/chunk.py --dry-run --tradition greek_mystery --only orphic-hymns' which produces 141 chunks under corpus/greek_mystery/orphic-hymns/chunks/ and zero writes elsewhere. So the re-run for this ticket is exactly: 'python scripts/chunk.py --tradition greek_mystery --only orphic-hymns' followed by 'python scripts/embed_corpus.py --reindex --tradition greek_mystery --text orphic-hymns'. Note the small flag-name mismatch: chunk.py uses --only for source_id, embed_corpus.py uses --text — both filter to a single text within a tradition. After C1+C2 land, the dry-run output here will drop from 141 chunks (one per source page) to ~88 (one per Roman-numeral hymn).
